title: Cobblemon Held Containers
description: Allows Pokémon to hold container items. Don't use this on public servers.
body:
# Cobblemon Held Containers

As of Cobblemon 1.7, Pokémon cannot hold container items. This is because it's dangerous to allow potentially millions of items in a single PC, especially on servers.

But if you're a crazy person in a singleplayer world, or playing with some friends, why should anyone stop you?

This datapack allows container items to be held by Pokémon. Please don't use this on public servers.
